case_name: Anil Yadav vs State of Haryana
summary: Bail for first-time offenders should be liberal
key_holding: First-time offenders with clean criminal record should ordinarily be granted bail unless offence is of exceptional gravity.
impact: Protects first-time offenders; presumption in their favor
full_text: A person's first brush with law deserves consideration. Bail should be granted to allow continuation of normal life while maintaining rule of law.
